reviews.comment:
Gasolinera de Automovil Club Argentino, bien atendida con espacios bien cuidados, zona de restaurante y zonas al aire libre. Ideal para hacer un alto en el camino !!!!

(Translated by Google)
Argentine Automobile Club gas station, well-run with well-maintained facilities, a restaurant area, and outdoor spaces. Ideal for a stop along the way!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyN3FENENREAE

reviews.comment:
Sumamente limpias todas las áreas y sobre todo los baños... Con mucho olor a lavandina, muy amables todos los empleados tanto de playa como en el café y muy lindo el espacio verde que rodea el establecimiento.

(Translated by Google)
The areas were extremely clean, especially the bathrooms... They smelled strongly of bleach. All the staff, both on the beach and in the cafe, were very friendly, and the green space surrounding the establishment was lovely.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyOXVycmR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Me gusta el salón y la rápida atención  y servicio. Rica panadería y venta de otros productos. Modernizaría los baños. Amplio estacionamiento.

(Translated by Google)
I like the café and the prompt service. Delicious bakery and other products for sale. I would update the restrooms. Ample parking.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQybHV2MWJBEAE

reviews.comment:
baños limpios ,agua caliente ,te atienden rápido ,no es el lugar para ir a cenar pero si para hacer una parada de descanso ,no falla . (muy buena atención en todos los turnos ,siempre atentos .

(Translated by Google)
Clean bathrooms, hot water, fast service, not the place to go for dinner but perfect for a quick break, it never disappoints. (Excellent service at all times, always attentive.)
